news.t: AAM Low Duration Preferred & Income Securities ETF Eclipses $500 Million AUM Milestone
Don't Cling to Cash. Check Out These Other Low-Risk Income Investments.

overview.description: The AAM Low Duration Preferred and Income Securities ETF (PFLD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value weighted U.S. index of short-term preferred and hybrid securities that are multifactor-selected. PFLD was launched on Nov 19, 2019 and is issued by Advisors Asset Management.
infoTable: ICE 0-5 Year Duration Preferred & Hybrid Securities Index
